headline: You spent Rs.4,43,544 on ads. Rs.9,62,679 net revenue reached your store (net).

utm_coverage_check.verdict: Below 60% threshold — campaign-level ROAS is directional only; account-level True ROAS is reliable.

the_roas_reality.meaning: What Meta + Google report, gross and pre-GST.
Platform revenue after adding 18% GST to ad cost.
Net Shopify revenue actually collected / ad cost incl. GST.

gap_callout.cause: Rs.33,822 gap between ad claims and Shopify net is driven by returns, GST on ad spend, and ~20% unattributed / pending COD orders.
